'''ât-w-j-w''' ('''katawjewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaff|chaff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaff|chaff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-w-j-w
|-
! Lemma
| katawjewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawjewoko|thitawjewoko]] || [[word:jitawjewoko|jitawjewoko]] || [[word:shitawjewoko|shitawjewoko]] || [[word:kitawjewoko|kitawjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutawjewoko|thuthutawjewoko]] || [[word:jujutawjewoko|jujutawjewoko]] || [[word:shushutawjewoko|shushutawjewoko]] || [[word:kukutawjewoko|kukutawjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutawjewoko|thutawjewoko]] || [[word:jutawjewoko|jutawjewoko]] || [[word:shutawjewoko|shutawjewoko]] || [[word:kutawjewoko|kutawjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutawjewoko|thutawjewoko]] || [[word:jutawjewoko|jutawjewoko]] || [[word:shutawjewoko|shutawjewoko]] || [[word:kutawjewoko|kutawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetawjewoko|thetawjewoko]] || [[word:jetawjewoko|jetawjewoko]] || [[word:shetawjewoko|shetawjewoko]] || [[word:ketawjewoko|ketawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotawjewoko|thothotawjewoko]] || [[word:jojotawjewoko|jojotawjewoko]] || [[word:shoshotawjewoko|shoshotawjewoko]] || [[word:kokotawjewoko|kokotawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawjewoko|thotawjewoko]] || [[word:jotawjewoko|jotawjewoko]] || [[word:shotawjewoko|shotawjewoko]] || [[word:kotawjewoko|kotawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawjewoko|thotawjewoko]] || [[word:jotawjewoko|jotawjewoko]] || [[word:shotawjewoko|shotawjewoko]] || [[word:kotawjewoko|kotawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtawjewoko|thĂŠtawjewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtawjewoko|jĂŠtawjewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtawjewoko|shĂŠtawjewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtawjewoko|kĂŠtawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatawjewoko|thathatawjewoko]] || [[word:jajatawjewoko|jajatawjewoko]] || [[word:shashatawjewoko|shashatawjewoko]] || [[word:kakatawjewoko|kakatawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawjewoko|thatawjewoko]] || [[word:jatawjewoko|jatawjewoko]] || [[word:shatawjewoko|shatawjewoko]] || [[word:katawjewoko|katawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatawjewoko|thatawjewoko]] || [[word:jatawjewoko|jatawjewoko]] || [[word:shatawjewoko|shatawjewoko]] || [[word:katawjewoko|katawjewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatawjewithi|shatawjewithi]] || [[word:shatawjewiji|shatawjewiji]] || [[word:shatawjewishi|shatawjewishi]] || [[word:shatawjewiki|shatawjewiki]]

|-
